creator: marius@alchemy.franken.de
text:
On Mon, Jan 25, 2010 at 09:57:24PM -0800, Rob Farmer wrote:
> On Mon, Jan 25, 2010 at 11:44 AM, Marius Strobl
> <marius@alchemy.franken.de> wrote:
> >
> > FYI, this is likely due to r202889. For now you should avoid updating
> > to that revision or beyond.
> >
> Thanks for the quick response! I reverted to rev 202888 and it now
> boots up fine.
> 

This is a tentative patch fixing the problem:
http://people.freebsd.org/~marius/sparc64_cpu_switch_mtx.diff
It seems to work fine but I'm waiting for it to pass a bunch of
buildworlds before committing it.

Marius
